day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_ssl: Day-7: Google local ranking penalty for HTTP sites — genuinely different from trust/visitor angle. See daily_email_plan.json ssl_pas_day7.
day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_mobile: Day-7: SSL ('Not Secure' for all visitors) OR missing click-to-call. Condition: SSL only if site is HTTP. See daily_email_plan.json mobile_pas_day7.
day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_no_website: Day-7: Named competitor ranking for '[trade] [town]' (preferred) OR 'businesses from nearby area' framing. See daily_email_plan.json no_website_bab_day7.
day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_aida: Day-7: Reviews not converting to search visibility — ranking gap persists. See daily_email_plan.json aida_keyword_gap_day7.
day7_pivot_rules.rule: Day-7 MUST be a genuinely different pain point. Campaign data confirms reframes do not perform.

day_14_breakup.status: PENDING — BRAIN generates copy Tuesday 2026-05-26 morning
day_14_breakup.type: 3 lines max. No pressure. No question marks. Door open. UK English.
day_14_breakup.rule: Maximum 4 total touchpoints — Day-14 breakup is the FINAL email. Hard limit. No exceptions.

batch_5_day3_results_expected.reply_probability: Day-3 bump significantly increases reply probability. Most responses come within 24-72 hours of the bump.

if_reply_received_weekend.instruction: If HANDS checks IMAP over the weekend and finds a Batch 5 reply: write to new_replies.json immediately. Classify in reply_classifications.json. If INTERESTED: prepare proposal draft — do not send until Monday morning. Log CHANGELOG.
if_reply_received_weekend.proposal_sla: 24 hours from reply — non-negotiable. Tom asked for pricing and never got it. That does not repeat.

monday_fallback.status: MANDATORY if Friday LinkedIn not executed
monday_fallback.instruction: Execute LinkedIn searches and connection requests. Write linkedin_profiles.json same session. See linkedin_connection_notes.json (monday_fallback_notes section) for ready-to-use sector templates.

hard_deadline.consequence: Archive all Batch 5 leads without confirmed LinkedIn as LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Log CHANGELOG immediately. No deferrals, no extensions. 48-session failure does not repeat.
hard_deadline.rule: Non-negotiable. linkedin_profiles.json MUST be written same session as execution.

imap_handling_rules_day7.if_clean: Send Day-7 new-angle email. Log CHANGELOG.
imap_handling_rules_day7.if_interested_reply_found: Do NOT send Day-7 email. Send interested variant instead (reply in thread). Classify. Proposal within 24h. LinkedIn by Day-7 hard deadline (still 2026-05-19). Update pipeline.
imap_handling_rules_day7.if_not_interested: Cancel Day-7 permanently. Suppress email channel. Block LinkedIn. Log CHANGELOG.
imap_handling_rules_day7.if_unsubscribe: Cancel Day-7. Suppress within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG.
imap_handling_rules_day7.if_ooo: Pause Day-7. Note return date. Resume day after return if within Day-14 window. 4-touchpoint limit applies.
imap_handling_rules_day7.if_wrong_person: Pause Day-7. Investigate correct contact. Log CHANGELOG.
